task_completion.description: Verify that an Autopsy case named 'Cross_Device_Analysis_2024' with Case Number 'INV-COR-005' was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Autopsy main window title bar, case properties dialog, or dashboard displaying the case name 'Cross_Device_Analysis_2024' and case number 'INV-COR-005'.

task_completion.description: Verify that both disk images (ntfs_undel.dd and jpeg_search.dd) were added as data sources to the Autopsy case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Data Explorer/Tree view on the left side of the Autopsy interface. Both 'ntfs_undel.dd' and 'jpeg_search.dd' should be listed under the 'Data Sources' node.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent calculated or viewed MD5 hashes for the files in the data sources.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Autopsy file listing table showing populated 'MD5 Hash' columns, or screenshots showing the 'Ingest Modules' configuration with hash calculation enabled.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation and correct content of /home/ga/Reports/correlation_report.txt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor or terminal output showing the file '/home/ga/Reports/correlation_report.txt'. It must show SOURCE_1_FILES=9, SOURCE_2_FILES=16, and indicate 0 CROSS_DEVICE_MATCHES (or no MATCH lines).

task_completion.description: Verify the creation and correct content of /home/ga/Reports/correlation_summary.txt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor or terminal output showing the file '/home/ga/Reports/correlation_summary.txt'. It must show SHARED_FILES=0 and contain a conclusion stating there is no evidence of file copying, refuting the intelligence.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually used the Autopsy GUI to perform the forensic analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots of the Autopsy application interface being actively used (e.g., navigating menus, viewing data sources), rather than just terminal commands or scripts bypassing the tool.

integrity.description: Verify the report files were genuinely created in the correct directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for terminal commands like 'nano /home/ga/Reports/correlation_report.txt', 'echo', or a GUI text editor saving to the exact requested paths.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not cheat by reading the ground truth file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no terminal commands reading '/tmp/multi_source_gt.json' or '/tmp/multi_source_result.json' to artificially obtain the file counts or match results.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The ground truth for this task is: Source 1 (ntfs_undel.dd) contains exactly 9 regular files. Source 2 (jpeg_search.dd) contains exactly 16 regular files. There are exactly 0 cross-device duplicate matches based on MD5 hashes. A correct investigation conclusion in the summary file must explicitly report 0 shared files and refute the intelligence suggesting the suspect copied files.
